steps.title: Define variable and express each type
steps.content: Let $n$ be the number of 8-inch brackets made. Then the number of 10-inch brackets is $4n$ (since it is 4 times $n$). The number of 3-inch brackets is given as $18$.

steps.title: Set up total and simplify
steps.content: The total number of brackets is the sum: $4n + n + 18$. This equals the daily total of $90$, so $$4n + n + 18 = 90.$$ Combine like terms: $4n + n = 5n$, giving $$5n + 18 = 90.$$ D is correct.
